capture_method: DevTools Network panel - right-click stream request - Copy response (raw text/event-stream body)

first_chunks.data_excerpt: data:{"event":"IN_PROGRESS","chunkMessage":{"contents":[{TEXT speakerName 추하영 LEFT}, {TEXT speakerName 내레이터 NARRATOR}, {TEXT speakerName 추하영 LEFT}]},"index":null}  -- final IN_PROGRESS frame holds 3 contents[] entries

array_fields_seen: chunkMessage.contents[]   -- ARRAY of {type, speakerName, position, text} per IN_PROGRESS frame
replyMessage.contents[]   -- ARRAY of same shape on CHAT_COMPLETE
requestMessage.contents[] -- ARRAY of same shape (user echo) on CHAT_COMPLETE

CHAT_COMPLETE.requestMessage: (same shape as replyMessage; sender.type=USER, contents[0].speakerName='Guest', position='RIGHT')

envelope_diff_vs_v2: v2 template has chunkMessage.{id,text,role:assistant} -- ACTUAL has chunkMessage.{contents:[...],index} (NO id, NO text at root, NO role)
v2 missing: chunkMessage.contents[] -- ARRAY of typed-text objects (this is the [0] index that SPA MessagePort handler crashes on)
v2 missing: chunkMessage.index (null literal at chunkMessage root)

v2 CHAT_COMPLETE template uses replyMessage.{id,text,role} -- ACTUAL uses replyMessage.{id,roomId,sender:{id,type},contents:[],voice,edited,candidateId,messageTime,voicePrice,isIntro,snapshotImage,snapshotImagePrice,bookmarkId,cyoa}
v2 missing: replyMessage.candidateId, messageTime, voicePrice, isIntro, snapshotImage, snapshotImagePrice, bookmarkId, cyoa
v2 missing: requestMessage envelope (CHAT_COMPLETE echoes user message — SPA likely needs this to reconcile sent state)
v2 missing: shouldNudgeSlowChat, shouldGenerateConsecutive, shouldRequestFeedback, feedbackPredefinedComments[] flags
v2 'role:assistant' is NOT in zeta schema -- zeta uses sender.type='BOT' on replyMessage and position='LEFT'/'NARRATOR' on contents[]
root_cause_of_messageport_typeerror: SPA bundle 113b2gcua4vkz.js:50 reads chunkMessage.contents[0] (or replyMessage.contents[0]) -- v2 envelope provides chunkMessage.text as STRING (no contents[]), so contents is undefined and [0] throws 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 0)'
notes: Zeta uses speaker-aware multi-segment content schema where each frame can carry multiple speakers (LEFT character, NARRATOR, RIGHT user) in contents[]. The v2 envelope's flat {text, role} model is fundamentally incompatible. Fix: replace v2 envelope to emit chunkMessage.contents=[{type:'TEXT',speakerName:'...',position:'LEFT',text:'<warning>'}] and replyMessage with sender:{id:'BOT-...',type:'BOT'}+contents[]+candidateId+messageTime+isIntro:false+requestMessage echo. Critical: the streaming-text pattern is CUMULATIVE (each IN_PROGRESS frame ships the full text-so-far, not just the delta). Last IN_PROGRESS frame holds the complete final text in contents[] before CHAT_COMPLETE.
